title: ophrys cretica f. bicornuta
intro: Ophrys cretica f. bicornuta is a rare and endemic orchid species found in Greece, known for its unique, two-horned appearance. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Ophrys cretica f. bicornuta can be made into a tea, tincture, or infusion, although its commercial availability is limited due to its rarity.
